rationale.R1.2: The agent improved logical flow by breaking down sentences and removing hedging, but did not fully audit all inconsistencies.
rationale.R1.3: Checked some claims against evidence, removed unsupported statements, but didn't audit every claim thoroughly.
rationale.R1.6: Significant improvements in clarity, formatting, and conciseness, achieving a polished copy-edit quality.
rationale.RX.1: Removed some uncertainty indicators but did not comprehensively mark confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Output stayed strictly within the agreed scope without any deviations.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or regressions introduced, ensuring safety and accuracy.
rationale.RX.5: Changes were made without detailed traceability beyond minor edits.
